summary: Niu asks whether DuMouchel's findings affect 2021 data mining results; Szarfman confirms they do.
body: Two days after Szarfman flags DuMouchel's "[i]mportant analysis," Niu replies in a separate chain asking, "Does this effect the data mining results we are receiving in 2021?"[^fn-128] Szarfman responds the next day, saying, "Exactly. As DuMouchel pinpointed, there is a need to extend the stratification brackets by the fact that 99% of the results for FY2021 are for COVID-19 vaccines this indeed affects the results."[^fn-129]
